questionText: Does your organization break down its Scope 1 and/or Scope 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type?
questionKo: 귀사는 Scope 1 배출량을 온실가스 유형별로 세분화합니까?
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: For many sectors and business activities, greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide are significant and relevant. Since these gases are often only reported in CO2-equivalents (CO2e), their contribution to overall emissions is sometimes masked. CDP therefore requests companies to break down their gross Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by GHG type.

columns.text: Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
options: Yes, both Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions
No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
columns.textKo: Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
optionsKo: Yes, both Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량
No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

columns.text: Primary reason for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
options: Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions inventory
Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not providing an emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type
optionsKo: Only CO2 is relevant to our Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량 inventory
Lack of internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not relevant

columns.text: Explain why your organization does not break down its Scope 1 or 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not break down its Scope 1 또는 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type

guidance.text:
General 
Select one of the "Yes" options if your organization's gross Scope 1 and/or Scope 2 emissions inventory contains greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide; e.g. any of the other six greenhouse gases covered by the Kyoto Protocol (methane, nitrous oxide, hydrofluorocarbons, perfluorocarbons, sulfur hexafluoride and nitrogen trifluoride).
Explain why your organization does not break down its Scope 1 or 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type (column 3) 
This column is only presented if you select either of the "No" options in column 1 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 2 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type" and explain any plans to provide a breakdown in the future.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Select one 의 "Yes" options 만약 귀사의 gross Scope 1 및/또는 Scope 2 배출량 inventory contains greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide; e.g. 하나 이상 의 other six greenhouse gases covered by the Kyoto Protocol (methane, nitrous oxide, hydrofluorocarbons, perfluorocarbons, sulfur hexafluoride 및 nitrogen trifluoride). 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not break down its Scope 1 또는 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type (열 3) This 열 is only presented 만약 you select either 의 "No" options in 열 1 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type". 설명 the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 2 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type" 및 explain 하나 이상 plans to provide a breakdown in the future.

guidance.text: Preparing an emissions inventory: The GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard provides requirements and guidance for companies and other organizations preparing a corporate-level GHG emissions inventory.
guidance.textKo: Preparing an emissions inventory: The GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting 및 Reporting Standard provides requirements 및 guidance for companies 및 other organizations preparing a corporate-level 온실가스 배출량 inventory.

simpleHelpKo: For many sectors 및 business activities, greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide are significant 및 relevant. Since these gases are often only 보고 in CO2-equivalents (CO2e), their contribution to overall emissions is sometimes masked. CDP therefore requests companies to break down their gross Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량 by GHG type.
